rows.label: tev020201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera what precipitated the emergency landing.

rows.label: tev020201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera about the Growth threat.

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera about the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera about the Growth threat.

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera about the Growth threat.

rows.label: tev020201_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask Ariel Sera about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0001
rows.name:
The xenoforms that laid waste to Earth
followed the White Whale and attacked us
without any attempt to issue demands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Commander Nagi ordered us into
our Dolls to fight back, but
the bastards kept coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0003
rows.name: I lost a lot of friends that day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0004
rows.name:
To a man, the survivors said they felt
lucky to have made it out alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0005
rows.name:
But I don't feel lucky at all. And I won't
until the day my fist meets the face of
whatever monster ordered that attack![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0006
rows.name:
I don't know where he is, but
when I find him, I'm gonna beat
him until he can't stand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yeah, something's troubling me all right. This BLADE
friend of mine who's like a little brother to me?
He went and found himself a girlfriend in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now every time we go drinking, I
get a bunch of questions about
love and relationships and crap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I could teach him loads about
how to throw a punch, shoot
a gun, or pilot a Doll...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I don't know a damn thing
about love! Never been in
love, and never want to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0013
rows.name:
I do know this, though: If he fails to jump-to during
an attack because he's mooning over what's-her-name,
I'm gonna answer all his love questions with my fists![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0021
rows.name:
So they're called the Growth, huh? We
finally know the name of our enemy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0022
rows.name:
And that means we're on the trail
of the bastards who trashed Earth
and killed my friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0023
rows.name:
I don't know what this Samaar Federation
is all about, but I don't care who
the Growth have backing them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Nothing is going to stop me from putting
this fist through their faces. They will
learn to fear the name of BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0039
rows.name:
Did you see that Riiz broad during the
attack? She was the one riding that giant
black monster and cackling like a maniac.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0040
rows.name:
As if using a monster to stomp screaming,
cowering civilians was just the most
hilarious thing in the world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0041
rows.name:
I won't forget that
twisted smile of hers...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0042
rows.name:
At least, not until my fist rearranges
it forever! Better hope your dental
plan is up to date, lady![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0057
rows.name:
Is it true you took down
that wretched Riiz broad?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0058
rows.name:
The way she grinned as she murdered
my friends... I had wanted to avenge
them with my own two fists![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0059
rows.name:
Nevertheless, I'm grateful for
what you did. Now everyone she
killed can rest a little easier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG0060
rows.name:
So let's keep this momentum going and destroy
the rest of the Growth. We'll teach those
bastards what humanity is really capable of![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1088
rows.name:
Thanks to your incredible work,
the Growth boss has been given the
beatdown he so richly deserved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1089
rows.name:
But there's still plenty of his wormy
little henchmen scurrying around Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1090
rows.name:
Now it's our turn! We'll smash
every last one of those
wretches who threaten NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1091
rows.name:
These fists of mine will blaze the
way to humanity's bright future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1094
rows.name:
I cannot BELIEVE that after
you introduced us, I ended up
being dumped because of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1095
rows.name:
Er, not that I even care, mind
you. I didn't need a lover
before, and I sure don't now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1096
rows.name:
All I need out of life is the
smell of gunpowder and a little
action to get my blood pumping.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020201_MSG1097
rows.name:
And with so many enemies left to
punch in the face, I don't have
time for a relationship anyway.[ST:wait ]
